g.text: Answers well but won't be retrieved.

svg.text: BGE-base-en-v1.5 (HuggingFace / local) → cosine similarity ranking → Claude Code batch verification
Cross-encoder rerankers (BGE Reranker, Cohere Rerank) offer 75× cheaper middle ground between stages
